items.description: Restructure the repository into top-level about, docs, and stats projects with updated root workspace and dev/build tooling.
items.notes: Use top-level about/docs/stats directories, not apps/. Keep /stats as the only public stats route.

items.description: Add the stats monitor service with 5chan-only community ingestion, Bitsocial metric naming, and Prometheus export.
items.notes: Use the official 5chan directories list only in v1. No Seedit communities yet. This slice also wires the monitor package into the root workspace.

items.description: Provision Grafana dashboards that mirror plebbit.online visually and structurally while using Bitsocial/community terminology.
verification: open local Grafana and inspect summary dashboard
open local Grafana and inspect /stats/5chan dashboard
items.notes: Keep the world map, peer charts, summary tables, provider sections, and repeated community panels. Hide NFT panels in v1.

items.description: Deploy the about/docs/stats stack to the VPS using host Caddy plus a new Docker Compose stack for Grafana, Prometheus, and the monitor.
items.notes: Current VPS already runs Caddy and listmonk. Do not disturb newsletter.bitsocial.net. Compose services bind to loopback only and are exposed through host Caddy.

items.description: Complete production cutover to bitsocial.net root, /docs, and /stats after the user updates Cloudflare manually, then run end-to-end verification.
verification: playwright-cli verification on desktop and mobile
items.notes: Vercel owns the apex and docs; `/stats` is proxied from Vercel to the VPS Grafana origin on port 8080. Grafana Live websockets still return 400 through Vercel, but the dashboards render and refresh through normal HTTP queries.
